subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Mahdí! Hearken unto the Call of God that hath been raised from the precincts of the Prison, calling all unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل مهدی اسمع ندآء الله انه ارتفع من شطر السجن و یدع الکل الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
